docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT OZDEMIR, ATAKAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JESUS HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT ATAKAN OZDEMIR IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE A PROPER REQUEST AND OBTAIN A COURT ORDER IF HE WISHES TO APPEAR REMOTELY AT NEXT COURT DATE. COURT TO REQUEST A SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF FOR NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-28-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO 12/13/23 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)
